feedback.text: Hello. I would like to suggest that we bring video games into the Digital Fairness Act. The other day I was trying to play Battlefield Bad Company 2, which I have purchased twice actually. Only to discover I couldn't play the multiplayer anymore. I tried everything I could think of, then I looked it up and found out the servers had been taken offline. To play multiplayer was the primary reason I bought the game, and now I'm locked out of it. I feel cheated honestly.
